title: gahnia hystrix
intro: Gahnia hystrix, also known as pringle's spear or prickly saw-sedge, is a type of flowering plant native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gahnia hystrix include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Gahnia hystrix can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
